review_title: Excellent quality and flexibility, low price.
description: I used the platform to generate the images for the covers of my books, getting the ideal images I was searching for and couldn't generate with other platforms.
author: Matteo A.
pros: Exceptional platform. After trying several, this is the best for me in several ways: - it offers countless templates to create high-quality images that range in all possible styles; - it offers many options to edit images, create from others, guaranteeing enormous flexibility to give shape to your ideas; - the site is fast, simple and intuitive despite the numerous options it offers; - the free plan - thanks to many simple and fast ways to earn credits - allows you to create hundreds of quality images per month and to use numerous tools on the platform; - the pro plan - to use many advanced templates - has very fair prices; - the quality of the images and the ability to create from text is excellent.
cons: Nothing really. It would be nice to have an introduction on its use, summarizing all the ways to earn credits and use models and tool for newbies. But anyway it's all pretty easy to learn.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Enjoying my time with Nightcafe. I have tried most of the free ones, but this is the one I keep coming back to.
author: tom A.
pros: Easy to understand and get started. Takes a bit of work to polish. The free version offers incentives to keep working on it daily, which helps a lot with improvement.
cons: Characters are pretty generic; changing to a different AI engine will give you a different look. Some things take a lot of tries to get what you want while editing
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Poor. It's unfortunate considering I was convinced by others of the software's positivity. Customer support shows me the customer is a pawn and that's all.
author: Lucas A.
pros: Easy to make an account. That's all I can say.
cons: Customer support hasn't responded in half a year. My account was disabled for unsaid reason, and I get to use the app. First impressions were terrible from that.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great creations and use of use
description: Overall easy to use great quality results in a matter of seconds. If you don’t like to can rescale or re submit
author: Carol D.
pros: Easy to use plus can give you examples to use. Five credits free each day. Rescaling quality is great. Also free first image then you get 5 more credits.
cons: Pop ups with suggestions on subscriptions that tell you price on subscriptions and having to exit out is a pain
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Nightcafe have a friendly interface, easy to use, you can get a lot of inspiration exploring the community designs. Awesome place, glad to found them!
author: Patricio C.
pros: Probably the best IA for generating images. Way better than the other known image generators. With the correct prompts you can get really stunning images.
cons: NightCafe is really addictive! credits are never enough!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Outstanding...i new nothing about AI image creation and now i feel confident i can produce high res products i enjoy
author: Philip C.
pros: The positive, supportive and encouraging community as well as all the tutorials and helpful tips during the create process.
cons: Possibly too many different models to choose from
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Its been so good. Especially the community, thats what makes it.
author: Torry B.
pros: Illustration of a cartoon like a multi colored fat cat in a kitchen cooking Thanksgiving dinner, wearing a pink apron with the word "Thanksgiving" written on it and has a big nervous smile wirh teeth gritting on their face. The cat is holding a wooden spoon and appears to be in the process of cooking, and looks crazy and surprised. The cat is fat and multicolored. On the counter, there is a large bowl of cranberries and a plate of roasted turkey. The kitchen has wooden cabinets and a window with white curtains. There are various kitchen utensils and dishes scattered around the counter.
cons: The token based image generation, they can go quickly if you need to do something complicated or need an advanced engine.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I use NightCafe daily. Some of what I create is simply for fun. Some of it I use to help develop or refine different ideas in my art practice. One nice thing about it is that you don't have to be a prompt guru to get fantastic results. Also, all the different models are fantastic. Pretty much any result you're looking for is possible.
author: Rachel M.
pros: Ease of use, variety of models available, ability to earn credits to create things, community challenges
cons: I have found anything so far that I really don't like
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It has become my go-to site for AI-generated graphics.
author: James P.
pros: It provides so many options and variations for AI-generated graphics. And it’s easy to use!
cons: I have found nothing to duslije at NightCafe Studio.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Such a wonderful experience creating art. NightCafe is user friendly and has a great community to interact with. Every day artists are gifted credits to vote on eachothers works and like creations. It's more than just a platform and has a very community based vibe.Not to mention the different options in choosing what type of AI and style you want to combine.
author: Neda T.
pros: The Community interaction. Also DallE 3 and Luma are great.
cons: Everything is great.There is nothing I haven't like so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: NightCafe Studio is the best AI generator I've ever used, since I tried many others. NightCafe Studio offers the best user interface and experience by far. It delivers serious tools, which are easy to understand and use as well. You get great value for your money.
author: Karim M.
pros: Nice user interface Easy to use Friendly pricing A great variety of generative models
cons: Well, generative AI in general has a certain learning curve and you don't necessarily get want you want at first try.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Overall it’s great. Moderators are a bit overzealous giving out bans where warnings would suffice.
author: Justin W.
pros: It’s a great platform and community and some really great art being produced.
cons: It can be very restrictive. Sometimes it will say you’ve used a ‘banned’ word in a prompt but won’t tell you what. If you’ve written a long descriptive prompt it can be a nightmare.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Gorgeous and fun and so easy to use and there is so much to learn
author: Jimmy E.
pros: It so easy to make outstanding pictures.
cons: All my credits go away to fast as it’s to fun making picture
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: EASY TO USE EVEN FOR PEOPLE OF OLDER AGE AND LOW COMPUTER ABILITY.
author: DEGI D.
pros: the large number of filter options and combinations there off make it possible to easily create and fine tune your art, using text to pic . I use nightcafe studio to create my art and them paint it so as to have finished visual before i start. As a person of older age memory sometimes is not as good, this finished visual reminds me of the art ideas that i had at the time thanks for that.
cons: NO COMPLAINTS happy with the way it is presented as it is very easy to use, u can start creating instantly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: i wanted to learn AI generative pictures
description: some models from NightCafé offered a good playground with a lovely community. To the point i upgraded a pro plan.
author: Jeff M.
pros: i wanted to learn and mess around with AI pictures the cheapest way possible.
cons: most of the advance prompts will ask some learning.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: It’s easy to use and there are a lot of options available.
author: Robert L.
pros: NightCafe is a fun and easy-to-use AI art tool with pretty cool tools and fun pictures. There is a built-in community that helps with inspiration. The pricing is fair and you can get additional credits by being part of the community.
cons: Some outputs can miss the mark, but overall, it’s a great creative tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Almost addictive in its simplicity to use, and just how much fun it is.
author: Rocky R.
pros: Ease of use and it is free to use. It is fun to create visions from the prompts you enter.
cons: It takes some editing to get pictures realistic sometimes. Also, some pictures are restricted if not phrased correctly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good. I enjoy using NightCafe! It helps me experience my hobbies as a creator, and that makes me very proud.
author: David H.
pros: I enjoy generating images related to my various hobbies. I started out depicting various superheroines, and those account for most of my images. I have also used the NightCafe AI program to depict Classic Diners and also vintage Trailer parks, and also some "Kaiju" pics (Godzilla and his ilk). I am having great fun working with NightCafe, and would like to encourage others to try it.
cons: Sometimes the AI program inserts extra appendages into the characters (Arms, legs, and sometimes even extra heads. Yikes!) But perhaps that can be fixed in the near future. That's what I'm hoping, anyway.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall very pleased with the app. Fun to use
author: Roger C.
pros: Very easy to use and so entertaining to use
cons: Pro accounts using pro tools can't enter those pictures in daily challenges
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Incredible platform for image generation. It's super easy to use, you don't have to pay to use it and all it's social interaction is very interesting. 10/10.
author: Nicolás F.
pros: A lot of image generating models, with free trials and A LOT of possibilities. The community is amazing and very supportive with people that are just starting. I loved it and I recommend it to EVERYONE!
cons: Nothing. In my opinion, everything they offer satisfies me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am having fun with Nightcafe. I love creating beautiful art, I am learning a lot, I love the many challenges. I like having a bit of contact with other players. You can earn and win more credits.
author: Ylona T.
pros: Making beautiful AI art, and the challenges.
cons: Not enough credits :). you do get free credits every day, you have to do things to earn more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great fun to use and even for someone with little or no talent, you will soon be creating mini masterpieces in next to no time. Simple and intuitive to use, you won't regret getting involved!
author: Andrew F.
pros: Very easy to use and great fun to learn and improve you creating!
cons: Will become highly addictive rapidly; still massive fun though!
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Creative, unusual, fun. Great to give a special touch to presentations, especially for future-oriented topics / audiences.
author: Enrico C.
pros: Lots of creative style presets available in free mode. In particular: easy for hi quality pictures in cyber/steam punk style. Engaging system of rewards (in-app tokens) for users who share creations, participate in contests, interact in the community.
cons: Some difficulty in representing details in landscapes, some stereotypes and cold expressions on human faces. Acceptable problems in a free AI app.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Experience has been great, the results you can achieve are fantastic.
author: Andy B.
pros: Great community. Fantastic models. Constantly releasing new models. Daily challenges. Ability to earn free credits.
cons: Recent changes took away options to earn feee credits, which means more reliance on paid subscription.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Terrible Customer Service, Outdated AI Models, Extreme Censorship, Very Expensive.
description: I deeply regret doing business with NightCafe. It was a complete waste of time and money. In the past 24 hours, I have located several other companies providing far higher-quality images, using updated AI models that give results much closer to the prompts I input. Why on earth did I waste so much at NightCafe?
author: Wyvern D.
pros: It was easy to download the art created there.
cons: In my personal experience, I found a shocking amount of censorship at NightCafe. It went beyond just NSFW or naughty words, into a question of what is "offensive" on a level that is perhaps not really reasonable. In addition, their customer service takes days to respond to basic questions. Their service is much more expensive than their competitors. And they are also NOT VERIFIED with Paypal, so be aware if you need to question a purchase (as I did), Paypal will -not- refund your money. Buyer Beware!
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
